purpose.summary: The COBOL program DBUNLDGS extracts authorization summary and detail data from an IMS database and inserts it into a GSAM dataset. It reads parent and child segments from the IMS database and writes them to a GSAM file.

inputs.name: PAUTBPCB
inputs.description: IMS database PCB for authorization data. Used to retrieve parent and child segments.

inputs.name: PASFLPCB
inputs.description: GSAM database PCB. Used to insert parent segments into the GSAM dataset.

outputs.name: GSAM Dataset
outputs.description: GSAM dataset containing extracted authorization summary and detail data.

called_programs.purpose: IMS DL/I call interface for accessing the IMS database.

business_rules.description: Process authorization summary records only if the account ID is numeric.
business_rules.logic_summary: Checks if PA-ACCT-ID is numeric before processing the authorization summary.

business_rules.description: Terminate program if the PAUT PCB status is not spaces or 'GB'.
business_rules.logic_summary: Checks PAUT-PCB-STATUS for values other than spaces or 'GB'.
conditions: IF PAUT-PCB-STATUS NOT EQUAL TO SPACES AND 'GB'

business_rules.description: Terminate program if the PAUT PCB status is not spaces or 'GE' during child segment processing.
business_rules.logic_summary: Checks PAUT-PCB-STATUS for values other than spaces or 'GE' during child segment processing.
conditions: IF PAUT-PCB-STATUS NOT EQUAL TO SPACES AND 'GE'

business_rules.description: Terminate program if the PASFL PCB status is not spaces during parent segment GSAM insertion.
business_rules.logic_summary: Checks PASFL-PCB-STATUS for values other than spaces during parent segment GSAM insertion.
conditions: IF PASFL-PCB-STATUS NOT EQUAL TO SPACES

transforms.transformation_description: Moves the contents of PENDING-AUTH-SUMMARY to OPFIL1-REC.
Moves the contents of PENDING-AUTH-DETAILS to CHILD-SEG-REC.
Moves the account ID to the root segment key.

paragraphs.purpose: This is the main program entry point. It receives control from the operating system via the DLITCBL entry point using PAUTBPCB, PASFLPCB, and PADFLPCB. It then immediately returns control to the calling program via the GOBACK statement. This paragraph essentially acts as a stub or a placeholder, as the core logic resides in the MAIN-PARA paragraph.

This paragraph serves as the main control loop for the program. It first calls 1000-INITIALIZE to perform initial setup tasks. Then, it enters a loop that repeatedly calls 2000-FIND-NEXT-AUTH-SUMMARY until WS-END-OF-ROOT-SEG is set to 'Y', indicating the end of the root segment data. Inside the loop, 2000-FIND-NEXT-AUTH-SUMMARY retrieves and processes authorization summary records. After processing all root segments, it calls 4000-FILE-CLOSE to close the output file. The paragraph uses PAUTBPCB, PASFLPCB, and PADFLPCB as input parameters.

This paragraph initializes the program by accepting the current date and day from the system. It then displays a series of messages to the console, including the program name, a separator line, and the current date. It prepares the program for processing by setting up the environment and displaying relevant information. The paragraph does not read any input files or write any output files. It only interacts with the system to retrieve the current date and display messages.

This paragraph serves as the exit point for the 1000-INITIALIZE paragraph. It contains a single EXIT statement, which returns control to the calling paragraph (MAIN-PARA). It does not perform any processing or data manipulation.

This paragraph retrieves the next authorization summary record from the IMS database using the DL/I call. It initializes PAUT-PCB-STATUS and then calls CBLTDLI with the FUNC-GN (Get Next) function code. If the call is successful (PAUT-PCB-STATUS is spaces), it increments counters, moves the retrieved data to OPFIL1-REC, initializes ROOT-SEG-KEY and CHILD-SEG-REC, moves PA-ACCT-ID to ROOT-SEG-KEY, checks if PA-ACCT-ID is numeric, calls 3100-INSERT-PARENT-SEG-GSAM to insert the parent segment into the GSAM dataset, and then calls 3000-FIND-NEXT-AUTH-DTL to retrieve child segments. If the PAUT-PCB-STATUS is 'GB' (end of database), it sets the end-of-database flag. If the PAUT-PCB-STATUS is neither spaces nor 'GB', it displays an error message and calls 9999-ABEND to terminate the program.

This paragraph serves as the exit point for the 2000-FIND-NEXT-AUTH-SUMMARY paragraph. It contains a single EXIT statement, which returns control to the calling paragraph (MAIN-PARA). It does not perform any processing or data manipulation.

This paragraph retrieves the next authorization detail record (child segment) from the IMS database using the DL/I call. It calls CBLTDLI with the FUNC-GNP (Get Next within Parent) function code. If the call is successful (PAUT-PCB-STATUS is spaces), it sets MORE-AUTHS to TRUE, increments counters, moves the retrieved data to CHILD-SEG-REC, and calls 3200-INSERT-CHILD-SEG-GSAM to insert the child segment into the GSAM dataset. If the PAUT-PCB-STATUS is 'GE' (end of parent), it sets the end-of-child-segment flag. If the PAUT-PCB-STATUS is neither spaces nor 'GE', it displays an error message and calls 9999-ABEND to terminate the program. Finally, it initializes PAUT-PCB-STATUS.

This paragraph serves as the exit point for the 3000-FIND-NEXT-AUTH-DTL paragraph. It contains a single EXIT statement, which returns control to the calling paragraph (2000-FIND-NEXT-AUTH-SUMMARY). It does not perform any processing or data manipulation.

This paragraph inserts the parent segment into the GSAM dataset. It calls CBLTDLI with the FUNC-ISRT (Insert) function code, using PASFLPCB and PENDING-AUTH-SUMMARY. If the call is not successful (PASFL-PCB-STATUS is not spaces), it displays an error message and calls 9999-ABEND to terminate the program. This paragraph is called from 2000-FIND-NEXT-AUTH-SUMMARY after a parent segment has been successfully read from the IMS database, and it ensures that the data is written to the GSAM output file.

This paragraph serves as the exit point for the 3100-INSERT-PARENT-SEG-GSAM paragraph. It contains a single EXIT statement, which returns control to the calling paragraph (2000-FIND-NEXT-AUTH-SUMMARY). It does not perform any processing or data manipulation.

error_handling.condition: PAUT-PCB-STATUS NOT EQUAL TO SPACES AND 'GB'
PAUT-PCB-STATUS NOT EQUAL TO SPACES AND 'GE'

open_questions.question: What is the purpose of PADFLPCB?
open_questions.context: It is passed in the linkage section but not used.
open_questions.suggestion: Examine calling programs to determine its purpose.

open_questions.question: What is the structure of the IMS segments PENDING-AUTH-SUMMARY and PENDING-AUTH-DETAILS?
open_questions.suggestion: Obtain the copybooks to understand the data being processed.

open_questions.question: What is the structure of OPFIL1-REC and OPFIL2-REC?
open_questions.context: These are the output records, but their structure is not defined in the provided code.
open_questions.suggestion: Examine the file definitions or related documentation to determine their structure.
